caption: Attention Biryani Lovers of Karachi! 🌟 Ever thought your secret biryani recipe could be the star of our menu? 🤔 Aaj ka din hai! Karachi Biryani is hosting the ultimate Biryani Battle Royale! 🚀 Share your unique recipe with us and get a chance to have it served in our restaurant. Imagine your creation delighting taste buds across Karachi! 🌆✨ So, grab those spices, channel your inner chef, and let's see who can rule the Biryani Kingdom! 👑 #BattleOfBiryani #KarachiFlavors #RecipeChallenge #BiryaniLoversUnite #SpiceItUp
cta: Share your recipe in the comments below or tag us in your post to participate!

caption: Throwback to the 90s, when Karachi Biryani was the talk of every mehfil and the king of taste! 🎥✨ Fast forward to today, and our love for biryani has only grown stronger. Remember the old radio tunes, the vibrant street food stalls, and the aroma that pulled you in? 📻🌿 Join us on a flavorful journey from 'Then to Now', set to the timeless melodies of 'Iris' by the Goo Goo Dolls. 🌈💕 Let's relive those golden days! What’s your favorite biryani memory? Share with us! 🌟 #ThrowbackBiryani #KarachiNostalgia #BiryaniThenAndNow #90sVibe #TasteOfTime
cta: Comment your favorite biryani memory or tag a friend who'd love this journey!

caption: The epic face-off you've all been waiting for! ⚔️ Biryani vs. Pulao: the ultimate debate that has divided families and friends. 😂 Which side are you on? Biryani ka spicy kick or Pulao ki subtle elegance? 🔥🥄 Let's add some humor to this classic rivalry! Check out our meme and let the comments decide the winner! Let's see kaun hai asli king! 👑 #BiryaniVsPulao #FoodWars #KarachiMeme #SpiceOrSubtle #HumorInABowl
cta: Cast your vote in the comments – are you Team Biryani or Team Pulao?
